title: mentha aquatica var. lloydii
intro: Mentha aquatica var. lloydii, also known as water mint or Lloyd's mint, is a variety of the water mint plant, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Mentha aquatica var. lloydii include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and provide relief from headaches and muscle tension. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
